title: Positive Crosshair
description: 😂You've never been as cheerful as this crosshair. This crosshair is incredibly cheerful! Be as cheerful as this cheerful crosshair!
body: Are you sad?😢 Are you crying? Don't be sad!☝️ You'll be happier with a cheerful crosshair! This crosshair is as cheerful as the funniest person in the world!😂😂😂
